query: select toUnixTimestamp(generated_time)*1000 as `t`, measures.value, measures.name, measures.type, machine, tc_build_id, project, branch, mode from idea array join measures where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),3)) and (triggeredBy = '') and (machine like 'intellij-linux-hw-hetzner%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-agg-hw-hetzner-agent%') and (branch = 'master') and (mode = '') and (project in ('project-import-maven-quarkus/fastInstaller','project-reimport-maven-quarkus/fastInstaller','project-import-from-cache-maven-quarkus/fastInstaller','project-import-maven-1000-modules/fastInstaller','project-import-maven-5000-modules/fastInstaller','project-import-maven-keycloak/fastInstaller','project-import-maven-javaee7/fastInstaller','project-import-maven-javaee8/fastInstaller','project-import-maven-jersey/fastInstaller','project-import-maven-flink/fastInstaller','project-import-maven-drill/fastInstaller','project-import-maven-azure-sdk-java/fastInstaller','project-import-maven-hive/fastInstaller','project-import-maven-quarkus-to-legacy-model/fastInstaller','project-import-maven-1000-modules-to-legacy-model/fastInstaller')) and (measures.name = 'maven.project.importer.post.importing.task.marker') order by t
select distinct machine as `machine` from kotlin order by machine

select toUnixTimestamp(generated_time)*1000 as `t`, measures.value, measures.name, measures.type, machine, tc_build_id, project, branch, mode from kotlin array join measures where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) and (triggeredBy = '') and (branch = 'master') and (mode = '') and (project in ('kotlin_empty/completion/Main_empty_place_with_library_cache_k2','kotlin_empty/completion/Main_empty_place_typing_with_library_cache_k2')) and (machine like 'intellij-linux-hw-hetzner%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-agg-hw-hetzner-agent%') and (measures.name = 'completion#mean_value') order by t

select toYYYYMMDD(generated_time) as `t`, avg(measures.value) as measure_value from idea array join measures where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),3)) and (machine like 'intellij-linux-performance-aws-i-%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-performance-aws-lt%') and (branch = 'master') and (measures.name = 'processingSpeed#Kotlin') group by t order by t

select toUnixTimestamp(generated_time)*1000 as `t`, measures.value, measures.name, measures.type, machine, tc_build_id, project, branch, mode from idea array join measures where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) and (triggeredBy = '') and (machine like 'intellij-linux-performance-aws-i-%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-performance-aws-lt%') and (branch like '261%') and (mode = '') and (project = 'kotlin/indexing') and (measures.name in ('fus_dumb_indexing_time','indexingTimeWithoutPauses')) order by t

select toUnixTimestamp(generated_time)*1000 as `t`, measures.value, measures.name, measures.type, machine, tc_build_id, project, branch, mode from idea array join measures where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),3)) and (triggeredBy = '') and (machine like 'intellij-linux-performance-aws-i-%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-performance-aws-lt%') and (branch = 'master') and (mode = '') and (project = 'empty_project/vfs-mass-update-kt') and (measures.name in ('vfsRefreshAfterMassCreate','vfsRefreshAfterMassDelete','vfsRefreshAfterMassModify')) order by t

select toYYYYMMDD(generated_time) as `t`, avg(measures.value) as measure_value from idea array join measures where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),3)) and (machine like 'intellij-linux-performance-aws-i-%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-performance-aws-lt%') and (branch like '261%') and (measures.name = 'processingSpeed#Kotlin') group by t order by t

select toUnixTimestamp(generated_time)*1000 as `t`, measures.value, measures.name, measures.type, machine, tc_build_id, project, branch from report array join measures where (branch = 'master') and (machine like 'intellij-linux-hw-hetzner%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-agg-hw-hetzner-agent%') and (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),3)) and (triggeredBy = '') and (project = 'com.intellij.codeInsight.XmlPerformanceTest.testIndentUnindent2 - indent/unindent 2001') and (measures.name = 'attempt.mean.ms') order by t

select toUnixTimestamp(generated_time)*1000 as `t`, measures.value, measures.name, measures.type, machine, tc_build_id, project, branch, mode from kotlin array join measures where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) and (triggeredBy = '') and (branch = 'master') and (mode = '') and (project = 'kotlin_empty/highlight/Main_with_library_cache_k2') and (machine like 'intellij-linux-hw-hetzner%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-agg-hw-hetzner-agent%') and (measures.name = 'localInspections#mean_value') order by t

select toUnixTimestamp(generated_time)*1000 as `t`, measures.value, measures.name, measures.type, machine, tc_build_id, project, branch, mode from idea array join measures where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),3)) and (triggeredBy = '') and (machine like 'intellij-linux-performance-aws-i-%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-performance-aws-lt%') and (branch like '261%') and (mode = '') and (project in ('empty_project/indexing','grails/indexing','java/indexing','spring_boot_maven/indexing','kotlin_petclinic/indexing','train-ticket/indexing','empty_project/second-scanning','grails/second-scanning','java/second-scanning','spring_boot_maven/second-scanning','kotlin_petclinic/second-scanning','train-ticket/second-scanning')) and (measures.name = 'numberOfIndexedFiles') order by t
select distinct project as `project` from idea order by project

select toUnixTimestamp(generated_time)*1000 as `t`, measures.value, measures.name, measures.type, machine, tc_build_id, project, branch, mode from kotlin array join measures where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) and (triggeredBy = '') and (branch = 'master') and (mode = '') and (project in ('kotlin_coroutines_qg/completion/AwaitStressTest_test_AwaitStressTest_typing_with_library_cache_k2','kotlin_coroutines_qg/completion/CoroutineContext_enqueue_CoroutineContext_typing_with_library_cache_k2','kotlin_coroutines_qg/completion/CoroutineContext_isJsdom_typing_with_library_cache_k2','kotlin_coroutines_qg/completion/Future_JobNode_Future_typing_with_library_cache_k2','kotlin_coroutines_qg/completion/Launcher_testLauncherEntryPoint_Launcher_typing_with_library_cache_k2','kotlin_coroutines_qg/completion/SchedulerTask_afterTask_SchedulerTask_typing_with_library_cache_k2','kotlin_coroutines_qg/completion/TestBase_finish_TestBase_typing_with_library_cache_k2','kotlin_coroutines_qg/completion/WorkerTest_test_WorkerTest_typing_with_library_cache_k2','kotlin_coroutines_qg/completion/CoroutineScheduler_in_constructor_typing_with_library_cache_k2')) and (machine like 'intellij-macos-perf-eqx%') and (measures.name = 'completion#mean_value') order by t

SELECT branch AS Branch, project AS Project, measure_name AS MeasureName, machine_group AS Machine, arraySlice(groupArray(measure_value), 1, 50) AS MeasureValues FROM (SELECT branch, project, multiIf((startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-hw-blade-')), 'linux-blade', (startsWith(machine, 'ij-linux-x64-perf-hw-blade-')), 'linux-unit-perf-blade', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-test-hw-blade-')), 'linux-blade-test', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-windows-hw-blade-')), 'windows-blade', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-windows-hw-munit-')), 'Windows Munich i7-3770, 32 Gb', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-aws-amd-lt') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-aws-amd-2-lt') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-aws-3-lt') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-aws-lt')), 'Linux C5ad.xlarge or M5ad.xlarge or M5d.xlarge or C5d.xlarge', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-macos-unit-2200-large-')), 'mac large', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-performance-aws-i-') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-performance-aws-lt')), 'Linux EC2 C6id.8xlarge (32 vCPU Xeon, 64 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-performance-tiny-aws-i-') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-performance-tiny-aws-on-demand-i-')), 'Linux EC2 C6id.xlarge (4 vCPU Xeon, 8 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'default-linux-aws-large-disk-')), 'Linux EC2 M5ad.2xlarge (8 vCPU Xeon, 32 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-windows-performance-aws-i-') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-windows-performance-mem-aws-i')), 'Windows EC2 C6id.4xlarge or i4i.4xlarge (16 vCPU Xeon, 32 or 128 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'qodana-fleet-linux-amd64-heavy')), 'Linux EC2 c5.xlarge fleet (4 vCPU, 8 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2004-aws-m5d-lt') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-m5d-lt') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2004-aws-m5dn-lt') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-m5dn-lt') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2204-large-disk-aws-1') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2004-large-disk-aws-1') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2204-large-disk-aws-2-i') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2204-large-disk-aws-3-i') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2204-large-disk-aws-4-i') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-2-i') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-1-i') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-4-i-') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-3-i')), 'Linux EC2 m5d.xlarge (4 vCPU Xeon, 16 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-hw-munit-')), 'Linux Munich i7-3770, 32 Gb', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-hw-EXC')), 'Linux JB Expo AMS i7-3770, 32 Gb', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-hw-hetzner') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-agg-hw-hetzner-agent')), 'linux-blade-hetzner', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-windows-hw-hetzner')), 'windows-blade-hetzner', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-macos-munit-741-large') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-macos-de-unit-1219') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-macos-munit-739-large') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-macos-munit-738-large') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-macos-munit-676-large')), 'Mac Pro Intel Xeon E5-2697v2 (4x2.7GHz), 24 RAM', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-performance-huge-aws-i')), 'Linux EC2 C6id.metal (128 CPU Xeon, 256 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'qodana-aws-cpu-x64')), 'Linux EC2 c5a(d).xlarge (4 vCPU, 8 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'qodana-linux-amd64-large')), 'Linux EC2 c5.large (2 vCPU, 4 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'qodana-linux-amd64-xl') OR startsWith(machine, 'qodana-linux-amd64-heavy') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2004-aws-i') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2004-aws-c5d') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2004-aws-c5ad-lt') OR startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2004-aws-m5ad-lt')), 'Linux EC2 c5.xlarge (4 vCPU, 8 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-c5ad-lt')), 'Linux EC2 (2204) c5.xlarge (4 vCPU, 8 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2004-aws-r5dn')), 'Linux EC2 r5dn.xlarge (4 vCPU, 32 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-macos-perf-eqx')), 'Mac Mini M2 Pro (10 vCPU, 32 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-windows-aws-i')), 'windows aws', match(machine, 'ij-w.*-azr.*'), 'windows-azure', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-windows-hw-de-unit')), 'Windows Munich i7-13700, 64 Gb', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-hw-de-unit')), 'Linux Munich i7-13700, 64 Gb', (startsWith(machine, 'fleet-linux-aws-ui')), 'Linux Fleet AWS UI', (startsWith(machine, 'fleet-windows-aws-r5d') OR startsWith(machine, 'fleet-windows-aws-m5d')), 'Windows Fleet AWS UI', (startsWith(machine, 'fleet-icri-ui-agent')), 'Mac Fleet AWS UI', (startsWith(machine, 'qodana-linux-arm64-memory-optimised')), 'Linux EC R7g.xlarge (4 vCPU ARM, 32 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'cidr.performance.')), 'Mac Cidr Performance', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-i4i')), 'Linux EC2 i4i.xlarge (4 vCPU Xeon, 32 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-r5d')), 'Linux EC2 r5d.xlarge (4 vCPU Xeon, 32 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2004-aws-4-i-')), 'Linux EC2 c5ad.xlarge (4 vCPU EPYC, 8 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-c5d')), 'Linux EC2 c5d.xlarge (4 vCPU Xeon, 8 GB)', (startsWith(machine, 'intellij-macos-docker-hw-de-unit')), 'Mac Mini M2 Pro 12 CPU, 32 GB', machine IN ('intellij-macos-hw-unit-1550', 'intellij-macos-hw-unit-1551', 'intellij-macos-hw-unit-1772', 'intellij-macos-hw-unit-1773'), 'macMini 2018', machine IN ('intellij-macos-hw-munit-716', 'intellij-macos-hw-munit-721', 'intellij-macos-hw-munit-722', 'intellij-macos-hw-munit-723', 'intellij-macos-hw-munit-724'), 'macMini Intel 3.2, 16GB', machine IN ('intellij-macos-hw-munit-608', 'intellij-macos-hw-munit-689', 'intellij-macos-hw-munit-690', 'intellij-macos-hw-munit-691', 'intellij-macos-hw-munit-692', 'intellij-macos-hw-munit-693', 'intellij-macos-hw-munit-694', 'intellij-macos-hw-munit-695', 'intellij-macos-hw-munit-696', 'intellij-macos-hw-munit-697', 'intellij-macos-hw-munit-698'), 'macMini M1, 16 Gb', machine IN ('intellij-macos-hw-unit-2204', 'intellij-macos-hw-unit-2205', 'intellij-macos-hw-unit-2206', 'intellij-macos-hw-unit-2207'), 'macMini M1 2020', machine IN ('intellij-windows-hw-unit-498', 'intellij-windows-hw-unit-499', 'intellij-windows-hw-unit-449', 'intellij-windows-hw-unit-463', 'intellij-windows-hw-unit-493', 'intellij-windows-hw-unit-504'), 'Windows Space i7-3770, 16Gb', machine IN ('intellij-linux-hw-unit-449', 'intellij-linux-hw-unit-499', 'intellij-linux-hw-unit-450', 'intellij-linux-hw-unit-484', 'intellij-linux-hw-unit-493', 'intellij-linux-hw-unit-504', 'intellij-linux-hw-unit-531', 'intellij-linux-hw-unit-534', 'intellij-linux-hw-unit-556', 'intellij-linux-hw-unit-558'), 'Linux Space i7-3770, 16Gb', 'Unknown') AS machine_group, measures.name AS measure_name, measures.value AS measure_value FROM perfintDev.idea ARRAY JOIN measures WHERE branch IN ('261', '262') AND measure_name IN ('indexingTimeWithoutPauses','scanningTimeWithoutPauses','dumbModeWithPauses','vfs_initial_refresh','build_compilation_duration','globalInspections','findUsages','localInspections','firstCodeAnalysis','completion','searchEverywhere','showFileHistory','%expandMainMenu','%expandProjectMenu','%expandEditorMenu','FileStructurePopup','createKotlinFile','highlighting','vcs-log-indexing','startInlineRename','debugRunConfiguration','debugStep_into','searchEverywhere_dialog_shown','showQuickFixes','createJavaFile','typingCodeAnalyzing','MatchedRatio','SyntaxErrorsSessionRatio','EditSimilarity','SyntaxErrorsSessionRatio','attempt.mean.ms','freedMemory','fullGCPause','gcPause') AND (machine_group IN ('Linux EC2 C6id.8xlarge (32 vCPU Xeon, 64 GB)')) AND mode = '' AND generated_time > subtractMonths(now(), 1) ORDER BY generated_time DESC) GROUP BY branch, project, measure_name, machine_group

select distinct project as `project` from kotlin order by project
select distinct machine as `machine` from report where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),3)) and (branch  = 'master') order by machine
select distinct project as `project` from report order by project
select distinct triggeredBy as `triggeredBy` from report where (branch  = 'master') and (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),3)) order by triggeredBy
select distinct branch as `branch` from report where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),3)) order by branch
select distinct project as `project` from report where (branch  = 'master') and (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),3)) order by project

select toUnixTimestamp(generated_time)*1000 as `t`, measures.value, measures.name, measures.type, machine, tc_build_id, project, branch, mode from kotlin array join measures where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) and (triggeredBy = '') and (branch = 'master') and (mode = '') and (project = 'kotlin_coroutines_qg/completion/Dispatchers_dispatch_async_Dispatchers_typing_with_library_cache_k2') and (machine like 'intellij-macos-perf-eqx%') and (measures.name = 'completion#mean_value') order by t

select toUnixTimestamp(generated_time)*1000 as `t`, measures.value, measures.name, measures.type, machine, tc_build_id, project, branch, mode from idea array join measures where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) and (triggeredBy = '') and (machine like 'intellij-linux-hw-de-unit%') and (branch = 'master') and (mode = '') and (project = 'idea/measureStartup') and (measures.name in ('fus_reopen_startup_code_loaded_and_visible_in_editor','reopenProjectPerformance/fusCodeVisibleInEditorDurationMs')) order by t

select toUnixTimestamp(generated_time)*1000 as `t`, measures.value, measures.name, measures.type, machine, tc_build_id, project, branch from report array join measures where (branch = 'master') and (machine like 'intellij-linux-2004-aws-m5d-lt%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-m5d-lt%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-2004-aws-m5dn-lt%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-m5dn-lt%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-2204-large-disk-aws-1%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-2004-large-disk-aws-1%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-2204-large-disk-aws-2-i%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-2204-large-disk-aws-3-i%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-2204-large-disk-aws-4-i%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-2-i%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-1-i%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-4-i-%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-2204-aws-3-i%') and (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) and (triggeredBy = '') and (project = 'com.intellij.aiCodeReview.core.backend.local.AiCodeReviewBackendPerfTest.grouping findings by path memoizes the anchor-type lookup - aiReview.findingsByPath.grouping') and (measures.name = 'attempt.mean.ms') order by t

select distinct machine as `machine` from idea where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),3)) and (project in ('intellij_commit/vfsRefresh/default','intellij_commit/vfsRefresh/with-1-thread(s)','intellij_commit/vfsRefresh/git-status','empty_project/vfs-mass-update-txt','empty_project/vfs-mass-update-java','empty_project/vfs-mass-update-kt','community/indexing','intellij_commit/indexing','community/indexingWithHighlighting','indexing-community/indexingWithHighlighting','indexing-intellij_commit/indexingWithHighlighting','space/indexing','kotlin_coroutines/indexing','kotlin/indexing','toolbox_enterprise/indexing','spring_boot/indexing','keycloak_release_20/indexing','empty_project/indexing','grails/indexing','java/indexing','spring_boot_maven/indexing','kotlin_petclinic/indexing','train-ticket/indexing','community/second-scanning','intellij_commit/second-scanning','space/second-scanning','kotlin_coroutines/second-scanning','kotlin/second-scanning','toolbox_enterprise/second-scanning','spring_boot/second-scanning','keycloak_release_20/second-scanning','empty_project/second-scanning','grails/second-scanning','java/second-scanning','spring_boot_maven/second-scanning','kotlin_petclinic/second-scanning','train-ticket/second-scanning','intellij_sources/checkout/243','intellij_commit/checkout/243','index-storage/default-2shards-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/default-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/default-w-coroutines-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/default-w-mru-cache-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/fake-writer-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/mmapped-2shards-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/mmapped-2shards-w-coroutines-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/mmapped-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/mmapped-w-coroutines-intellij_commit/indexing')) and (branch  = 'master' or branch like '261%') order by machine

select distinct machine as `machine` from idea where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) and (project in ('project-import-gradle-1000-modules/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-1000-modules-limited-ram/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-5000-modules/fastInstaller','project-import-android-500-modules/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-ktor/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-ide-services-server/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-bytechef/fastInstaller')) and (branch  = 'master') order by machine

select distinct mode as `mode` from idea where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),3)) and (project in ('intellij_commit/vfsRefresh/default','intellij_commit/vfsRefresh/with-1-thread(s)','intellij_commit/vfsRefresh/git-status','empty_project/vfs-mass-update-txt','empty_project/vfs-mass-update-java','empty_project/vfs-mass-update-kt','community/indexing','intellij_commit/indexing','community/indexingWithHighlighting','indexing-community/indexingWithHighlighting','indexing-intellij_commit/indexingWithHighlighting','space/indexing','kotlin_coroutines/indexing','kotlin/indexing','toolbox_enterprise/indexing','spring_boot/indexing','keycloak_release_20/indexing','empty_project/indexing','grails/indexing','java/indexing','spring_boot_maven/indexing','kotlin_petclinic/indexing','train-ticket/indexing','community/second-scanning','intellij_commit/second-scanning','space/second-scanning','kotlin_coroutines/second-scanning','kotlin/second-scanning','toolbox_enterprise/second-scanning','spring_boot/second-scanning','keycloak_release_20/second-scanning','empty_project/second-scanning','grails/second-scanning','java/second-scanning','spring_boot_maven/second-scanning','kotlin_petclinic/second-scanning','train-ticket/second-scanning','intellij_sources/checkout/243','intellij_commit/checkout/243','index-storage/default-2shards-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/default-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/default-w-coroutines-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/default-w-mru-cache-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/fake-writer-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/mmapped-2shards-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/mmapped-2shards-w-coroutines-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/mmapped-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/mmapped-w-coroutines-intellij_commit/indexing')) and (branch  = 'master' or branch like '261%') order by mode

select distinct triggeredBy as `triggeredBy` from idea where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),3)) and (project in ('intellij_commit/vfsRefresh/default','intellij_commit/vfsRefresh/with-1-thread(s)','intellij_commit/vfsRefresh/git-status','empty_project/vfs-mass-update-txt','empty_project/vfs-mass-update-java','empty_project/vfs-mass-update-kt','community/indexing','intellij_commit/indexing','community/indexingWithHighlighting','indexing-community/indexingWithHighlighting','indexing-intellij_commit/indexingWithHighlighting','space/indexing','kotlin_coroutines/indexing','kotlin/indexing','toolbox_enterprise/indexing','spring_boot/indexing','keycloak_release_20/indexing','empty_project/indexing','grails/indexing','java/indexing','spring_boot_maven/indexing','kotlin_petclinic/indexing','train-ticket/indexing','community/second-scanning','intellij_commit/second-scanning','space/second-scanning','kotlin_coroutines/second-scanning','kotlin/second-scanning','toolbox_enterprise/second-scanning','spring_boot/second-scanning','keycloak_release_20/second-scanning','empty_project/second-scanning','grails/second-scanning','java/second-scanning','spring_boot_maven/second-scanning','kotlin_petclinic/second-scanning','train-ticket/second-scanning','intellij_sources/checkout/243','intellij_commit/checkout/243','index-storage/default-2shards-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/default-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/default-w-coroutines-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/default-w-mru-cache-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/fake-writer-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/mmapped-2shards-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/mmapped-2shards-w-coroutines-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/mmapped-intellij_commit/indexing','index-storage/mmapped-w-coroutines-intellij_commit/indexing')) and (branch  = 'master' or branch like '261%') order by triggeredBy

select distinct mode as `mode` from idea where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) and (project in ('project-import-gradle-1000-modules/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-1000-modules-limited-ram/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-5000-modules/fastInstaller','project-import-android-500-modules/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-ktor/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-ide-services-server/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-bytechef/fastInstaller')) and (branch  = 'master') order by mode

select distinct triggeredBy as `triggeredBy` from idea where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) and (project in ('project-import-gradle-1000-modules/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-1000-modules-limited-ram/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-5000-modules/fastInstaller','project-import-android-500-modules/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-ktor/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-ide-services-server/fastInstaller','project-import-gradle-bytechef/fastInstaller')) and (branch  = 'master') order by triggeredBy
select distinct branch as `branch` from idea where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),3)) order by branch

select toUnixTimestamp(generated_time)*1000 as `t`, measures.value, measures.name, measures.type, machine, tc_build_id, project, branch from report array join measures where (branch = 'master') and (machine in ('intellij-linux-hw-hetzner-agent-05')) and (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) and (triggeredBy = '') and (project = 'com.intellij.air.review.core.backend.local.AiCodeReviewBackendPerfTest.anchor resolve normalizes the file once per batch - aiReview.anchor.resolve.oncePerFile') and (measures.name = 'attempt.mean.ms') order by t

select measures.name from report array join measures where (project = 'com.intellij.xml.XmlLexerTest.testPerformance1 - XML Lexer Performance on pallada.xml') and (branch  = 'master') and (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) group by measures.name order by measures.name

select distinct project as `project` from idea where ( project like '%/measureStartup%' or project like '%/warmup%') and (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) and (branch  = 'master') order by project
select distinct branch as `branch` from kotlin where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) order by branch
select distinct triggeredBy as `triggeredBy` from kotlin where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) and (branch  = 'master') order by triggeredBy
select distinct mode as `mode` from kotlin where (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) and (branch  = 'master') order by mode

select distinct mode as `mode` from idea where (branch  like '261%') and (machine like 'intellij-linux-performance-aws-i-%' or machine like 'intellij-linux-performance-aws-lt%') and (triggeredBy = '') and (triggeredBy = '') and (generated_time >subtractMonths(now(),1)) order by mode
